subjects.name: Accounting

subjects.name: Economics

subjects.name: Geography
subjects.description: Physical geography, map skills, and South African development

subjects.name: History
subjects.description: South African and world history from the Cold War to democracy

subjects.name: Tourism
subjects.description: Destinations, tourism impacts, and professional practice
